element_introduction_order.element: Character-specific superpowers with mutant power bar
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Resource management - players learn power bar regenerates slowly and depletes with special moves
Wolverine's aerial claw attacks, Cyclops' optic blasts, character differentiation
Power bar management across party - switching reverts bar to last use state

element_introduction_order.element: Support character calls (Storm, Rogue, Iceman, Archangel)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Additional tactical layer alongside main gameplay
Level-breaking potential - can skip many areas
Environmental threat creates tension throughout narrative
Climax - revelation that Magneto orchestrated virus

typical_tension_triggers: Power bar depletion forcing reliance on basic attacks
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: High tension with difficulty spikes; players oscillate between tactical character-switching for relief and boss encounters that spike difficulty significantly. Healing factor and regenerating power bars provide paced recovery moments.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Nightcrawler's teleportation can skip many areas, suggesting optional/secret pathways

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundational - players learn basic combat, character mechanics, and power bar management
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating complexity with boss fights, support mechanics introduced, character switching becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Significantly escalated - near-impossible-to-beat bosses, Mojo level requiring Genesis reset button exploit
notable_spikes: Mojo's Crunch - requires physically resetting Genesis (game-breaking difficulty spike)
Magneto final battle - narrative climax with extreme difficulty
General difficulty noted as 'unfairly placed enemies' and 'ridiculously annoying jumps'

notable_level_patterns.description: Most levels feature boss fights with familiar X-Men villains at completion; creates predictable escalation and narrative punctuation
Entire game framed as unpredictable Danger Room training with virus-infected control systems; creates thematic coherence across all levels
Levels can be approached differently based on selected character; Nightcrawler's teleportation allows area skipping unique to his playstyle
Near end of first level, Sauron appears as unexpected help mid-flight; breaks enemy pattern expectations early
